text.message: Don’t let him get road haha
He’d have all resources and a port
Is there any chance I get it
Please don’t block me after the plow
Don’t forget that black needs sheep so we can’t let him get a 2:1 deal on his own turn
I have no other place to block you black
I’m having trouble understanding. You tell me I took the risk with getting plowed…but you didn’t take the risk of getting soloed given that you plowed me and then didn’t give a solid option for me
To block you with someone else?
red secretly gets a brick port as you are arguing
You cannot reprimand me for soloing you because you gave me no other option
I can if you’re not making the best play
I’ll do that oj if you give me insurance
I have a feeling I'll be plowed by red...
I dont wanna get soloed all the game
I just wanna get the settle down
wait why can't i counter offer
i was looking for one wood for one sheep
u are on solid 4 points mate
Yes, red is ahead of you but genuinely not by much
no wood is OK with your brick port
I would rather not being targeted that much and having that monster production
wonder why blued didn't go to 9 4 11 and lock me out of ore
they ve just embargoed u before it
blue even robs you once lol
I guess red is straight to victory with you arguing
bro red and blue are not far apart
And black is officially ahead of red
red has longest roads so +2 to red
No. Black has way better road prospects
I never take road from black
oj I wonder why are we not seeing the board that much different
u guys took all of them
Will you give me insurance oj
after you do your thing this turn
If I 7 out then I'm not gonna give back lol
I made a mistake maybe then
I think oj is also doing well
Since black is going for dp
basically my ore = red's ore, and when I have that many ores red already wins
We hope red doesn’t get a bunch of 5s and 6s haha
u guys took me down a lot I haven't done a single thing for like 20 turns
Doesn’t mean anything you could be at 7
Help me extend one of yall?
Black could win this turn sadly
You have 3 brick and at least 2 wood
same thing u do to the black at the beginning
Why are you mad at me?
I have been fighting for the fact that black was ahead of you early on, before oj could see it
cause u are yapping a lot without knowing the devs
Oh my bad didn’t see you had a mono
